network_summary: Dr. Yosif Jabir DDS, MBA, FAGD is the founding authorized official across three Chicagoland GP locations in Shorewood (Brookforest Dental Group PC), Downers Grove (Yosif Jabir DDS PC), and Plainfield (Pinnacle Dental Group). His own bio confirms prior partnerships in Plainfield and Shorewood. He now practices primarily at White Oak Family Dental (Downers Grove + Naperville). The Plainfield practice (Pinnacle Dental Group, EIN 800072608) is described as 'family owned since 2003' and now operates under the Qahwash family with 3 locations (Plainfield, Clarendon Hills, New Lenox). PatientConnect365 explicitly cross-references Brookforest and Pinnacle as affiliated practices. No MSO, management company, or PE backer found. This is a dentist-owned private multi-office group with no platform/DSO layer.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Yosif Jabir DDS, MBA, FAGD — founding partner/authorized official. Current day-to-day at Pinnacle: Dr. Lena Qahwash and Dr. Otto Qahwash (Qahwash family, family-owned since 2003). Current day-to-day at Brookforest: unnamed dentists (Jabir listed as vice-president per dentistsok.com). Jabir now primarily at White Oak Family Dental (Downers Grove + Naperville).

Jabir bio on whiteoakfamilysmiles.com explicitly states 'held partnerships in dental offices in Plainfield and Shorewood'

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: The NPPES AO entry for Jabir at the Downers Grove location (YOSIF JABIR DDS PC, 1121 Warren Ave) is his own personal PC entity — this is the same person as the AO, not a separate owner. The Downers Grove address now operates under White Oak Family Dental branding. Brookforest Dental Group (Shorewood) continues to operate under that name with Jabir as vice-president/AO but not necessarily the primary clinical dentist. Pinnacle Dental Group (Plainfield) has expanded to 3 locations (Plainfield, Clarendon Hills, New Lenox) and is now operated day-to-day by the Qahwash family — Jabir remains the NPPES AO as the founding partner/PC registrant. No stale/closed locations detected.
evidence_chain: AO signal: YOSIF JABIR listed as authorized official on NPPES across 3 org NPIs in 3 ZIPs (60431 Shorewood, 60515 Downers Grove, 60544 Plainfield). Documentary corroboration: (1) Jabir's own bio page at whiteoakfamilysmiles.com explicitly states he 'held partnerships in dental offices in Plainfield and Shorewood' — directly connecting him to the Pinnacle and Brookforest locations. (2) PatientConnect365 listing for Pinnacle Dental Group cross-references Brookforest Dental Group as an affiliated practice. (3) dentistsok.com lists Jabir as dentist/vice-president at Brookforest Dental Group. (4) Pinnacle Dental Group is described as 'family owned since 2003.' No MSO, management company, DSO brand, or PE sponsor found across three web searches and four page fetches.
future_app_notes: Jabir appears to have stepped back from day-to-day operations at both Brookforest and Pinnacle. He may remain a minority partner/AO while the Qahwash family runs Pinnacle. Confirm whether Jabir is still clinically active at Brookforest or if he sold his stake there too. Pinnacle now has 3 consumer-facing locations (Plainfield, Clarendon Hills, New Lenox) — the Clarendon Hills and New Lenox locations are NOT in the NPPES cluster; they may be under different NPIs or Qahwash NPIs. White Oak Family Dental (Downers Grove + Naperville) should be checked separately to see if Jabir is the owner/founder there or just an associate. No PE or MSO lead to follow at this time.
